seoTitle: Island Beach vs Iwantja — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Island Beach vs Iwantja: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Island Beach and Iwantja.
heading: Island Beach vs Iwantja — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Island Beach, South Australia and Iwantja, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Iwantja has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Island Beach (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Island Beach or Iwantja safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Island Beach has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Iwantja scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Island Beach scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Iwantja scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Island Beach or Iwantja?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Iwantja has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
